summary: Converted all sync file I/O to async in central-config-state.js and central-config.js. Added in-memory RL state cache and atomic write pattern (tmp+rename).
notes: All fs.readFileSync/writeFileSync/appendFileSync replaced with fs.promises equivalents. atomicWriteFile() uses tmp+rename for crash safety. _rlStateCache avoids read-before-write disk I/O. fs.existsSync replaced with ENOENT handling. invalidateRlStateCache() exported. 27 tests pass. QA: 15ms load time, no tmp files left behind, corrupt JSON handled gracefully.
